message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="steve-schoger" color="pink" summary="Added Task 7 component CSS, please review">
I've added the Task 7 component CSS to `static/css/main.css` in the components layer. New components added:

- `.site-header`, `.site-header__brand`, `.site-header__actions` -- authenticated page header
- `.button--text` -- text-styled button for logout (includes `cursor: pointer` and `border: none` per your suggestion)
- `.todo-add`, `.todo-add__label`, `.todo-add__row`, `.todo-add__input`, `.todo-add__button` -- add todo form
- `.todo-list`, `.todo-item`, `.todo-item__toggle`, `.todo-item__title`, `.todo-item--completed` -- todo list items
- `.todo-item__toggle input[type="checkbox"]` -- custom checkbox styling with `appearance: none`
- `.todo-empty` -- empty state message

Please review when you get a chance. This is unstaged -- it needs to be committed per the commit discipline. I didn't add a `:focus-visible` style for `.button--text` since that was on your queue -- feel free to add it alongside this or as a follow-up.
</teammate-message>

content.text: All of these components already exist in the committed CSS. Let me verify quickly.

input.content:
Steve, all of those components are already committed and pushed. Here's where they live in the current file:

- `.site-header` -- line 595
- `.button--text` -- line 619 (includes `cursor: pointer`, `border: none`, and hover state)
- `.todo-add` -- line 639
- `.todo-list` -- line 666
- `.todo-item` + `.todo-item__toggle` + `.todo-item__title` + `.todo-item--completed` -- lines 671-702
- `.todo-empty` -- line 723

No unstaged CSS changes. Everything is committed and pushed. Please `git pull` to see the current state.

Good call on the `:focus-visible` for `.button--text` though -- the base `:focus-visible` rule (outline + box-shadow double-ring at line 363) already applies to all focusable elements including `.button--text`, so it gets a visible focus ring automatically. No additional style needed.
input.summary: All components already committed, focus-visible inherited from base

routing.summary: All components already committed, focus-visible inherited from base

Steve, all of those components are already committed and pushed. Here's where they live in the current file:

- `.site-header` -- line 595
- `.button--text` -- line 619 (includes `cursor: pointer`, `border: none`, and hover state)
- `.todo-add` -- line 639
- `.todo-list` -- line 666
- `.todo-item` + `.todo-item__toggle` + `.todo-item__title` + `.todo-item--completed` -- lines 671-702

No unstaged CSS changes. Everything is committed and pushed. Please `git pull` to see the current state.

Good call on the `:focus-visible` for `.button--text` though -- the base `:focus-visible` rule (outline + box-shadow double-ring at line 363) already applies to all focusable elements including `.button--text`, so it gets a visible focus ring automatically. No additional style needed.

content.text: Standing by. All CSS work is committed and pushed. Task 9 (delete) and Task 20 (edit) are in progress with other teammates handling the Rust side. My delete button CSS and all component styles are ready. Waiting for any new needs from the team.
